list.vod_content: Heather is a New York City girl and a best-selling author on a mission to conquer writerвҖҷs block and avoid paying back an advance on her next book. Her plans take a sudden swerve when she inherits a family ranch in Montana. With her two best friends, Heather heads out for a вҖңYellowstoneвҖқ adventure intent on a quick sale but is blindsided by both the ranchвҖҷs dilapidated conditio...
